info.title: MoonMind API
info.description: API for MoonMind - LLM-powered documentation search and chat interface

get.description: Health endpoint with database connectivity probe.

post.description: Load documents from a GitHub repository.

Summarizes a code repository.
Currently supports generating a README.md file.
Generate Jira stories from plan text using the JiraStoryPlanner.

schema.title: Response Plan Jira Stories V1 Planning Jira Post
Response Retrieve Context Pack Retrieval Context Post

get.description: Return all registered MCP tool definitions.

post.description: Persist worker checkpoint state and optional run metadata.

get.description:
Retrieves the profile of the current authenticated user.
If a profile does not exist, it will be created.
Returns a sanitized response with key-set flags (no actual key values).

put.description:
Updates the profile of the current authenticated user.
Returns a sanitized response with key-set flags (no actual key values).

get.description: Return Codex shard health and associated volume metadata.

post.description: Run the Codex login status check for the specified workflow run.

get.description: Return workflow runs filtered by query parameters.
Return run status, per-phase metadata, and artifact summaries.
Return ordered task states for the specified workflow run.
Return artifact metadata for the specified workflow run.

post.description: Retry a failed workflow run starting from the failed stage.

schema.title: Response List Profiles Api V1 Provider Profiles Get

get.description: Return the session history for a given profile.

post.description:
Create a new session from an expired, failed, or cancelled predecessor.

Copies the profile and volume settings from the previous session.

schema.title: Response Create Execution Api Executions Post

post.description:
Rerun an existing failed/completed workflow with the same parameters.

This endpoint fetches the original execution's parameters and creates
a new workflow execution with identical settings.

get.description: Return detailed metadata for a specific automation artifact.
Return the artifact file as a streamed download.

Get the current live session status for a task run.

This is intended for Mission Control operators to view live log outputs.

schema.title: Response Get Live Session Api Task Runs  Id  Live Session Get

404.description: Live session not found for this task run

get.description: Fetch current live-session payload for a worker.

schema.title: Response Get Live Session Worker Api Task Runs  Id  Live Session Worker Get

404.description: Live session not found for this task run

post.description: Report live-session lifecycle updates for a task run.

schema.title: Response Report Live Session Api Task Runs  Id  Live Session Report Post
Response Heartbeat Live Session Api Task Runs  Id  Live Session Heartbeat Post

get.description: Serve dashboard sub-routes from one HTML shell.
List currently available skills for task dashboard submission forms.

post.description: Create a new local skill from the dashboard.

schema.title: Response Create Dashboard Skill Api Tasks Skills Post

LOGIN_BAD_CREDENTIALS.summary: Bad credentials or the user is inactive.

REGISTER_USER_ALREADY_EXISTS.summary: A user with this email already exists.

detail.reason: Password should be at least 3 characters

VERIFY_USER_BAD_TOKEN.summary: Bad token, not existing user or not the e-mail currently set for the user.

UPDATE_USER_EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS.summary: A user with this email already exists.
